solution.title: How does it
solution.subtitle: 4 steps to turn your Meta campaigns into a client generator.

steps.title: The prospect fills out
steps.subtitle: your form
steps.description: Nothing changes for the user. They arrive from your ad and answer your questions. Each response is analyzed in real time.

steps.title: Automatic
steps.subtitle: OK / KO qualification
steps.description: Minimum budget, project type, urgency, client profile. If the prospect matches → OK. Otherwise → KO. You filter before the call.

steps.title: Only qualified profiles
steps.subtitle: trigger Meta
steps.description: Only validated prospects trigger conversion events. Meta learns to find profiles similar to your real clients only.

steps.title: Your cost per client
steps.subtitle: drops day after day
steps.description: Meta no longer optimizes on all prospects, only on qualified ones. Result: your CPA drops and every euro spent brings you closer to a real client.

secteurs.title: Smart Leads works for your industry
secteurs.subtitle: Any business that generates leads through Meta can benefit.
secteurs.notFoundPost: — if you generate leads through Meta, we can probably help.

formulaire.title: Are you eligible?
formulaire.subtitle: Answer 5 quick questions. 90 seconds, no more.
formulaire.spoiler: Spoiler: you're testing the technology live right now.
formulaire.disclaimer: 🔒 Your answers are analyzed only to assess the relevance of a collaboration. No data is resold.

items.q: Does it work with my existing forms?
items.a: Yes. We adapt the qualification to your current funnel. In some cases, we slightly optimize the flow to integrate OK / KO criteria without hurting conversion.

items.q: Do I need to redo my landing pages?
items.a: No. The qualification mechanism integrates with your current system, without a complete redesign.

items.q: How long before I see results?
items.a: The first adjustments typically appear within 2 to 4 weeks. Meta needs a minimum of qualified signals to optimize effectively.

items.q: Does it reduce my number of leads?
items.a: No. It reduces the number of unqualified leads. The goal is to increase your closing rate, not raw volume.

items.q: Does it work if I sell through calls?
items.a: Yes. It's actually in appointment-based sales that strategic qualification has the most impact.

items.q: Is it suitable for my industry?
items.a: The method is applicable to any industry that generates leads, in B2B or high-value B2C.

items.q: What if my leads are already good?
items.a: We analyze your current performance. If your funnel is already performing well, we optimize the signal sent to Meta to amplify the most profitable profiles.

items.q: Does it work with a small budget?
items.a: Yes, provided there's enough volume for Meta to learn. We define together a budget consistent with your goals.

items.q: How is this different from a standard Meta agency?
items.a: Most agencies optimize campaigns. We optimize what Meta learns. The difference is in the signals sent, not just the ads.
Yes. We analyze your situation and present you with a clear action plan before any collaboration.

cgv.title: Terms of Service
cgv.article1Text: These Terms of Service govern the contractual relations between ECOMSKY (SARL), with its registered office at 229 rue Saint-Honoré, 75001 Paris, France (hereinafter "the Provider"), and any natural or legal person wishing to benefit from the services offered via the website smart-leads.fr (hereinafter "the Client").
cgv.article2Text: The Provider offers consulting and technology deployment services aimed at optimizing lead qualification from online advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Ads and other platforms). Services include:
article2Items: Audit of advertising campaigns and existing forms
Deployment of an AI scoring system on the Client's forms
Ongoing monitoring and optimization of results
cgv.article3Text: Each service is subject to a personalized quotation sent to the Client. Signing the quotation or written confirmation (including by email) constitutes acceptance of these Terms of Service and a firm commitment from the Client.
cgv.article4Text1: Prices are indicated in euros excluding taxes (HT) on the quotation. Applicable VAT will be added in accordance with current regulations.
cgv.article4Text2: Invoices are payable upon receipt, unless otherwise stated on the quotation. Any late payment automatically entails the application of late payment penalties at a rate of 3 times the legal interest rate, as well as a fixed indemnity of €40 for recovery costs.
cgv.article5Text: The duration of the service is defined in the quotation. Either party may terminate the contract by giving 30 days' written notice. In the event of early termination by the Client, amounts already paid remain with the Provider in proportion to work completed.
article6Items: Provide necessary access to their advertising accounts and website
Communicate accurate and complete information necessary for the delivery of services
Actively collaborate with the Provider in defining qualification criteria
cgv.article7Text: The Provider undertakes to implement all necessary means for the proper execution of services. This is an obligation of means, not of result. The Provider cannot be held responsible for the performance of the Client's advertising campaigns, as these depend on numerous external factors.
cgv.article8Text: Each party undertakes to treat as confidential all information exchanged in the context of the service. This confidentiality obligation remains in effect for 2 years after the end of the contractual relationship.
cgv.article9Text: These Terms of Service are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the parties undertake to seek an amicable solution. Failing that, the competent courts of Paris shall have sole jurisdiction.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.contactValue: via the form available on smart-leads.fr
privacy.dataCollectedText: In the course of using the website smart-leads.fr, we may collect the following data:
dataCollectedItems: Information provided in the qualification form (name, email, phone, information about your business and advertising campaigns)
Browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited, visit duration)
Data transmitted via UTM parameters from advertising campaigns
privacy.purposeText: Your data is collected for the following purposes:
purposeItems: Assess the relevance of a collaboration between you and ECOMSKY
Improve the quality of our services and website
Measure the performance of our advertising campaigns
privacy.legalBasisText: The processing of your data is based on your consent (form submission) and our legitimate interest (improvement of our services and performance measurement).
privacy.retentionText: Your personal data is retained for a maximum of 24 months from collection, unless otherwise required by law. Browsing data is retained for 13 months in accordance with CNIL recommendations.
privacy.sharingText: Your data is never resold to third parties. It may be shared with:
sharingItems: Our technical subcontractors (hosting, analytics tools) strictly within the scope of the service
Advertising platforms (Meta, Google) for conversion tracking, only for qualified leads
privacy.sharingNote: All our subcontractors are subject to confidentiality and security obligations in compliance with GDPR.
privacy.rightsText: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

rightsItems.name: Right of access
rightsItems.desc: obtain a copy of your personal data

rightsItems.name: Right of erasure
rightsItems.desc: request the deletion of your data

rightsItems.name: Right of objection
rightsItems.desc: object to the processing of your data

rightsItems.name: Right to portability
rightsItems.desc: receive your data in a structured format

rightsItems.name: Right of restriction
rightsItems.desc: restrict the processing of your data

privacy.rightsContact: To exercise these rights, contact us via the form available on smart-leads.fr. We commit to responding within 30 days.
privacy.rightsCnil: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) — www.cnil.fr.
privacy.cookiesText: The website smart-leads.fr uses technical cookies necessary for the website's operation and audience measurement cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
